scripts.cap:build: npm run build && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:release: npm run build && npx cap copy android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.prebuild: node ../../tmp/fix_node_modules.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); const vj=path.resolve('src/app/version.json'); if(!process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_VERSION){const rv=fs.readFileSync('../../version.json','utf8'); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(vj),{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(vj,rv);}"
scripts.predev: node ../../tmp/fix_node_modules.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); const vj=path.resolve('src/app/version.json'); if(!process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_VERSION){const rv=fs.readFileSync('../../version.json','utf8'); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(vj),{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(vj,rv);}"
